name: Andrew Gillum
subject: You deserve a debate
body:
#
Team --
When we launched our campaign for Florida Governor this past March, we promised that we'd run in every county, and be up front and open about our policies and platform. And that's what we're doing.
Tonight, at the Florida Democratic Party Conference, I proposed a series of debates across the state of Florida in both red and blue counties. But we need your help to make sure they happen.
[**Can you chip in $5 tonight to show the state of Florida that it 's time for a change in 2018?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3260/9e00690/4e3ea247/24031044/3134895917/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171028-debate")
You, and every other Florida Democrat, deserve the opportunity to hear our stories, our policies, and our ideas before voting. It's the best way to ensure we end up with the best possible candidate for the Florida general election.
But more than politics, this is about the future of our state and country. The next Governor isn't going to represent just the people who voted for them -- they have to represent all 20 million of us.
I hope you'll join us.
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3260/9e00690/4e3ea247/24031044/3134895917/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171028-debate")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3260/9e00690/4e3ea247/24031047/3134895917/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3260/9e00690/4e3ea247/24031046/3134895917/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3260/9e00690/4e3ea247/24031059/3134895917/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

But we need your help to make sure they happen. "" You, and every other Florida Democrat, deserve the opportunity to hear our stories, our policies, and our ideas before voting. name: Team Kaine
subject: a "vicious" fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
According to USA Today, these 12 races will be key to who controls the Senate after the 2018 midterms.

And it will be a dramatic, vicious, multi-billion dollar fight. Right wing special interests including the gun lobby will pour millions of dollars to try to put an anti-immigrant, anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ mini-Trump like Corey Stewart into the US Senate.

We have to be ready to fight back. Can you help make sure we're ready to re-elect Tim Kaine?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?refcode=20171028&amount=20.18

Pitch in to support Tim Kaine >>
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?refcode=20171028&amount=20.18

Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please unsubscribe [ http://action.timkaine.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/?Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1379915 ].

name: Democrats.org
subject: Outraised and outspent by the GOP
body:
Let's start November with momentum on our side.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before our end-of-month deadline to help Democrats compete and win all over the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c673/3150915699/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd")**
**
Derek --

Our October fundraising deadline is on Tuesday, and we need your help.

The GOP is outraising and outspending us. That's not a huge surprise -- it's no secret they have millionaires and special interests propping them up. But we can't continue to let the fundraising gap grow. Democrats are facing tight races in a matter of days and we want to have the resources it takes to win this year and in 2018.

[**Will you chip in $3 now to support Democrats?**](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c670/3150915699/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+chip+in+3+now+to+support+Democr&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd")

If we're going to get our country back on track, we have to elect Democrats at every level. We believe that, if we do our jobs and get our message in front of voters, we will win. So, we're focused on building tools and hiring more organizers.

Tuesday is our last big deadline before the November 7th election and so much is at stake. What we raise now will determine our ability to win this year and build for the crucial races in 2018. That's why I'm asking supporters like you to pitch in $3 or whatever you can right now.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c671/3150915699/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c67e/3150915699/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c67f/3150915699/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c67c/3150915699/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c67d/3150915699/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/october-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c67a/3150915699/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd")
** Thanks,

Joe

Joe Smolskis
Chief Financial Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c67b/3150915699/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c678/3150915699/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c679/3150915699/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523afe/4067b0a/46ec9525f/7e67c606/3150915699/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171029_js_nd&source=em_20171029_js_nd&refcode=em_20171029_js_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: The numbers I keep repeating to myself >>
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63bc/24c69fd9/179e6a62b/189ffcf1/1312799854/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact&source=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact")
---

Peter,

**Over 50 endorsed women in 13 states. Nine days to go.**

These are the numbers I keep repeating to myself as time ticks away to Election Day 2017. We are now laser-focused on helping our women across the country make this final push.

Right now, our women are making their final pitches to voters. Volunteers are hustling to knock as many doors and make as many phone calls as possible.

We're hustling, too. This is the last fundraising deadline before Election Day, and your support during this time is absolutely critical to our candidates.

**[Donate $3 to help hit our $125,000 End-of-Month goal so we can support all of our candidates during this last push.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63bc/24c69fd9/179e6a62b/189ffcf2/1312799854/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171028_email_OctoberEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+hit+our+125000+EndofMon&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact&source=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact")**

Here are a few of the fights we need to win over the next week:

In Virginia, our 16 women could help flip the House of Delegates from red to blue.

In Washington State, Democrats could turn the state Senate blue and end the Republicans' blockade of popular progressive policies.

At an even more local level, Yvette Simpson in Cincinnati and Vi Lyles in Charlotte would be the first African American women to ever be mayors of their respective cities. And Yvonne Spicer in Massachusetts is running to be Framingham's first EVER mayor.

There are only nine days left to make sure these women and dozens of others have all they need to win. They're counting on us to help them out.

**Donate $3 before October is over to help elect the next generation of progressive champions all across the country:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Hit-Our-October-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63bc/24c69fd9/179e6a62b/189ffcf3/1312799854/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171028_email_OctoberEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHitOurOctoberGoa&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact&source=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact")**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

**[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63bc/24c69fd9/179e6a62b/189ffcec/1312799854/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171028_email_OctoberEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact&source=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact")**

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|
---
Paid for by EMILY's List [www.emilyslist.org](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63bc/24c69fd9/179e6a62b/189ffced/1312799854/VEsD/ "http://www.emilyslist.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5+-+wwwemilyslistorg&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact&source=WQEFEJ61N_digital_email_20171029_ElectionDayNineDays_inact") and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Geoff Burgan
subject: About last night
body:
#
Team --
Last night Andrew hands down won the Florida Democratic Party's gubernatorial forum in Orlando. He was passionate; he was authentic; and most of all, he put some real energy into this campaign to take back our state. He proposed the Democrats host at least six debates -- with cross-talk and rebuttals, because our voters deserve to know where we stand on the future of this state.
If you don't believe me, just ask these folks:
_Politico 's Marc Caputo_:
"Judging by applause, Tallahassee Mayor Andrew Gillum scores best with the crowd of a few hundred at Fla Dems gubernatorial forum"
_Caputo - again_ :
"Andrew Gillum gives a rousing close at Fla Dems gubernatorial forum, where he recalls how his grandma used to tell him to "bring it home." He's a tough act to follow..."
_The Associated Press_ :
"I don't believe you have to be from a famous family or write your own check to become governor of the state of Florida," Gillum said to loud applause."
_The Florida News Service 's Lloyd Dunkelberger:_
"Tallahassee Mayor Andrew Gillum was the most visible candidate for much of Saturday, talking to delegates and attending meetings."
_Florida Politics ' Mitch Perry_:
"Minutes before they debate for just the third time, @AndrewGillum proposes 6 debates amongst the Dem candidates before next August"
_Ryan from Tallahassee_ :
".@AndrewGillum speaks to Florida Democratic values - healthcare is a human right, no person is illegal"
And Andrew promised a whole lot more: "And that's just the warm-up. #BringItHome"
[**Can you put $20.18 in the tank today? Our fundraising period closes on Tuesday night. We need to build some momentum off of last night.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3264/9e00690/4e12941a/24031038/3711428070/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171029-lastnight")
Bring it home,
Geoff Burgan
Communications Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3264/9e00690/4e12941a/24031038/3711428070/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-oct2017?refcode=em171029-lastnight")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3264/9e00690/4e12941a/2403103b/3711428070/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3264/9e00690/4e12941a/2403103a/3711428070/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3264/9e00690/4e12941a/2403103d/3711428070/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")
clean_body: Team -- Last night Andrew hands down won the Florida Democratic Party's gubernatorial forum in Orlando. He was passionate; he was authentic; and most of all, he put some real energy into this campaign to take back our state. He proposed the Democrats host at least six debates -- with cross-talk and rebuttals, because our voters deserve to know where we stand on the future of this state. If you don't believe me, just ask these folks: Politico 's Marc Caputo: "Judging by applause, Tallahassee Mayor Andrew Gillum scores best with the crowd of a few hundred at Fla Dems gubernatorial forum" Caputo - again : "Andrew Gillum gives a rousing close at Fla Dems gubernatorial forum, where he recalls how his grandma used to tell him to "bring it home." He's a tough act to follow..." The Associated Press : "I don't believe you have to be from a famous family or write your own check to become governor of the state of Florida," Gillum said to loud applause." The Florida News Service 's Lloyd Dunkelberger: "Tallahassee Mayor Andrew Gillum was the most visible candidate for much of Saturday, talking to delegates and attending meetings." Florida Politics ' Mitch Perry: "Minutes before they debate for just the third time, @AndrewGillum proposes 6 debates amongst the Dem candidates before next August" Ryan from Tallahassee : ".@AndrewGillum speaks to Florida Democratic values - healthcare is a human right, no person is illegal" And Andrew promised a whole lot more: "And that's just the warm-up. #BringItHome" "" Bring it home, Geoff Burgan Communications Director Andrew Gillum for Governor "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

name: Team Ryan
subject: 2 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

If we had told you two years ago that Republicans would hold the House, the Senate, and the White House by 2017, would you have believed us?

Looking back at where we were in 2015, it's hard to believe how far we've come. So what's changed in the last two years?

**The biggest change? The Democrats are out of power.**

And since then . . .

More than a **million new jobs have been added** to the American workforce, **unemployment is at its lowest since 2001** , and the **stock market is soaring**.

What else? Well, we **rolled back dozens of Obama-era regulations** , passed landmark legislation to **support our veterans** , gave our **troops the largest pay raise** in 8 years, and we **expanded the GI bill**.

And just last week, we **passed a conservative budget** that will put our country back on the path toward sustained prosperity and will **pave the way for tax reform.**

Republicans just want to make people's lives better. Simple as that. **When Paul Ryan became Speaker two years ago, that was his goal: to make life easier for Americans by getting rid of invasive leftist policies.**

We want to thank you, Friend. Without your support, we would not be where we are today. [**But we still have a lot to accomplish and we hope you will continue to support your House Republicans so they can continue to pass your conservative agenda**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MzEyOTQ4NjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0Mzc4OTE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)**.**

Thank you,

Team Ryan

****[DONATE](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MzEyOTQ4NjUS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0Mzc4OTE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Team Ryan. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Team Ryan's online community. Click [here](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=31294865&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0Mzc4OTE4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe from Team Ryan.

Thanks for supporting our party.

name: alert@dscc.org
subject: re: Betsy DeVos' latest move (POLITICO)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Betsy DeVos wants to change what the Senate looks like, Team, and POLITICO is reporting that she's teaming up with fellow Trump cabinet member and GOP mega-donor Linda McMahon to get the job done.
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171029-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Betsy DeVos wants to change what the Senate looks like, team,

And _POLITICO_ is reporting that she's teaming up with fellow Trump cabinet member and GOP mega-donor Linda McMahon to get the job done.

**Their new group is aiming to be a "conservative counterweight" to groups like the Women's Senate Network** \-- and that's going to make our work -- and your support -- even more critical in 2018.

We have ten female Senators up for re-election in 2018 -- and after seeing how DeVos undercut the rights of sexual assault victims we REFUSE to let our amazing Senate champions be replaced with candidates handpicked by the likes of Betsy DeVos, team.

[**WIll you stand with us in this fight? Pitch in $1 right now to the 2018 Women 's Senate Network to help counter the GOP's new big money group and elect TRUE women's champions to the Senate.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171029-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Our Democratic Senate women have strong records of standing up for women -- from Kirsten Gillibrand's tireless quest for justice for sexual assault survivors to Tammy Baldwin's lifelong fight for equal pay.

And now, we have two chances to grow their ranks with Jacky Rosen, who's fought to protect women's access to health care, and Kyrsten Sinema, a leader in the fight to renew the Violence Against Women Act.

Our Senate Democratic women are fighting hard for us -- and with TEN of them up for re-election next year, it's up to us to support each one of them, and elect more Democratic women too.

**Let 's give our candidates the resources to take on the GOP's deep pockets AND send a powerful message to any group trying to replace them. Chip in now to immediately put your gift to work for the Women's Senate Network:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/true-champions**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171029-Alert_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dc40/2b07114c/f93a4687/7316cbff/4011648155/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dc40/2b07114c/f93a4687/7316cbfe/4011648155/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954dc40/2b07114c/f93a4687/7316cbf9/4011648155/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: PETITION: Stop voter suppression
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde45/2a380d31/21d8ac7/fe154f/2845217599/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde45/2a380d31/21d8ac7/fe154f/2845217599/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
There's no denying it, everyone. The right to vote is under attack.
It's under attack because ultraconservative Republicans can't stop fantasizing about a voter fraud problem that just plain old doesn't exist, and it begs a question about what part of democracy they're afraid of.
You don't have to look far to find the answer. State-level Republicans are passing voting laws and talking about drawing district lines that discriminate against minorities and communities of color. They're silencing hard-working families and rigging the system to tip the scales in their favor.
The scary part is that over the last few years, we've seen that their attempts at voter suppression are working.
**Congress has the power to render these attempts at silencing targeted groups of Americans ineffective, but so far it has not acted.[Will you sign our petition to urge Congress to stop discriminatory voting laws before they happen?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde45/2a380d31/21d8ac7/fe1548/2845217599/VEsF/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/ndrcvra?utm_source=hassan&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ndrcvra")**
Look, if we don't protect voting rights, equal representation in our democracy cannot and will not be realized.
This is a real problem, and we ALL need to speak up.
[**The time to take real action to protect voting rights is now, so please add your name to tell Congress that every single one of us deserves a voice in our elections.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde45/2a380d31/21d8ac7/fe1548/2845217599/VEsC/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/ndrcvra?utm_source=hassan&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ndrcvra")
Thank you for everything you do,
Team Maggie
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde45/2a380d31/21d8ac7/fe1549/2845217599/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MTAyOV92b3RpbmdyaWdodHMtcnNfYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20171029_votingrights-rs_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde45/2a380d31/21d8ac7/fe154a/2845217599/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

**

**

[ ](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde45/2a380d31/21d8ac7/fe154b/2845217599/VEsB/ "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/legalcode")
clean_body: "" "" There's no denying it, everyone. The right to vote is under attack. It's under attack because ultraconservative Republicans can't stop fantasizing about a voter fraud problem that just plain old doesn't exist, and it begs a question about what part of democracy they're afraid of. You don't have to look far to find the answer. State-level Republicans are passing voting laws and talking about drawing district lines that discriminate against minorities and communities of color. They're silencing hard-working families and rigging the system to tip the scales in their favor. The scary part is that over the last few years, we've seen that their attempts at voter suppression are working. Congress has the power to render these attempts at silencing targeted groups of Americans ineffective, but so far it has not acted. "" Look, if we don't protect voting rights, equal representation in our democracy cannot and will not be realized. This is a real problem, and we ALL need to speak up. "" Thank you for everything you do, Team Maggie ""

name: Donna Edwards
subject: Our first month
body:
[](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff5d/767134fb/5c226bab/433814ac/2139972811/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171029-MD")
We launched this campaign not knowing what to expect -- but we knew anything was possible if we stood together.
Because there is so much to do: our government must be more transparent and accountable, our economy needs to grow in a way that benefits everyone, and our schools and teachers must receive the funding they need.
Now the power of this message, and what we can accomplish, relies on this community and everything you do in this moment. **October 31st is the end of our first month****of****the campaign, and our ability to win and make this change will be measured by how many people pitch in and are ready to join this fight.**
[**Will you pitch in $5 or more to this campaign for County Executive and show that we 're ready to bring more opportunity to Prince George's county? I'm counting on you, not big donors, to power this campaign. **](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff5d/767134fb/5c226bab/433814ac/2139972811/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171029-MD")
**We 've set a big goal -- to raise $25,000 from grassroots contributors in our first month.** I know this is a challenge, but if everyone who reads this chips in what they can I know we can do it. And I wouldn't want to build this campaign any other way.
Thank you for everything you do.
Donna

**[Contribute](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff5d/767134fb/5c226bab/433814ac/2139972811/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dfe-email?refcode=em171029-MD")**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Email is the best way to stay in contact with supporters like you, but if you wish to unsubscribe from all emails, please [click here.](http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/page/m/74feff5d/767134fb/5c226bab/433814ad/2139972811/VEsC/ "http://action.donnaforprincegeorges.org/unsubscribe")

Authority: Donna for Prince George's, Glenn Ivey, Treasurer
P.O. Box 44343
Fort Washington, MD 20749

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: NY Times: "No Democrat more at risk"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Big news from the New York Times. |
---

| | **_New York Times_ : "No Democrat in the Senate is more at risk than
Mr. Donnelly"**
**Joe NEEDS your help to fight for Indiana.**[Chip in>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24b4/7377f838/34fc81cf/51fbba12/242016838/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octeom?refcode=20171029nd&amount=10")**** Peter -- Wow. First _Roll Call_. Then CNN. And now the _New York Times_ : They all agree that Joe is in one of the toughest races in the country.

And Republicans seem to agree, too. In fact, they're determined to win Indiana's Senate seat so they can shove through an extreme agenda that only looks out for their wealthy, special interest donors. That's why groups like Americans for Prosperity are already spending $1.9 million on attack ads this month alone to smear his record.

Peter, Joe has stood up to these attacks before, and he can do it again -- but he needs you on his side. **Before Tuesday 's big deadline, will you help us hit our 300 supporter end-of-month goal and give Joe the resources to fight back?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
